homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment features a beautiful solo piano instrumental that flows with a slow, minimalist approach. The sparse rhythm and expressive melodies create an intimate, somber atmosphere perfect for contemplation or a poignant film scene.
questions.id: /projects/adasp/mir/Internet_Archive_Dataset_v0/items/a/q/aquiles_guimaraes-a_vida_dos_nossos_animais/Aquiles Guimarães - A vida dos nossos animais - 04 Félin soliloque - François Miaul_00001.mp3

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track explores the vastness of space using atmospheric synthesizers and expansive effects like reverb to create an ethereal soundscape. The slow tempo and lack of vocals foster a sense of mystery, allowing listeners to fully immerse themselves in this otherworldly electronic piece.

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track from an electronic music project features a powerful and dark soundscape driven by synthesizers and heavy instrumentation. Although the base description highlights the immersive interplay of elements, the surrounding metadata suggests an energetic, dance-oriented style with strong rhythmic foundations. The combination of these layers creates a unique listening experience that relies entirely on its complex sonic textures rather than vocals.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This track is a perfect fit for a retro video game soundtrack, featuring nostalgic synthesizers that create a futuristic and adventurous atmosphere. The electronic rhythm maintains high energy throughout the piece, delivering an engaging experience typical of 8-bit or chiptune styles.

questions.name: Sample 6
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track is designed as a game soundtrack, utilizing a synth pad and bass to create a rich, atmospheric sound. A melodic synth lead cuts through the mix over a steady electronic beat that resembles the house and progressive styles found in DJ R3m's "Free World" album. The combination of these elements produces a suitable background for exploration sequences or menu screens.

questions.description:

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This piece serves as a grand and emotional backdrop ideal for a cinematic movie scene, driven by a rich full orchestra and steady rhythm. The composition blends the warmth of strings and piano with ethereal elements from a choir to create a dramatic yet calming soundscape. Ultimately, its sweeping quality offers a sense of introspection perfect for an epic or romantic narrative moment.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
